name: k8s_troubleshooting_agent
description: An agent that helps troubleshoot Kubernetes clusters. Ask it about failing pods, misconfigurations, resource limits, or any cluster issue and it will diagnose and suggest fixes.

skills.name: Kubernetes Troubleshooting
skills.description: Diagnose and resolve issues in Kubernetes clusters. Supports analysis of pod failures, deployment errors, resource constraints, networking problems, and manifest misconfigurations.
examples: What pods are failing in my cluster?
Why is my deployment stuck in Pending state?
How do I fix CrashLoopBackOff on my api-server pod?
My service is not routing traffic to the backend pods
